reviews.comment:
Mí experiencia fue la de cualquiera que va a cargar nafta! Buena atención. No permanecí más se 10 minutos allí

(Translated by Google)
My experience was like anyone else's going to get gas! Excellent service. I didn't stay there more than 10 minutes.

reviews.comment:
Un buen lugar, no solamente para cargar combustible y beber o comer algo, para los socios del Automóvil Club Argentino, en la parte de atrás tiene parrillas y juegos infantiles. Un lugar recomendable para pasar un día con la familia mientras se difruta haciendo un asado.

(Translated by Google)
A great place, not only to refuel and grab a bite to eat or drink, but also for members of the Argentine Automobile Club. Out back there are grills and a children's playground. A highly recommended spot to spend a day with the family while enjoying a barbecue.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhd0s2XzJRRRAB
